'''Skot OnSon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] who served as the youngest member of the terrorist group known as [[Desert Wind]]. He was tall and thin, with long blond hair and a crescent-shaped scar on his forehead. His family lived near [[Kibo Sands]], and had its water supply cut off by the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]]. Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]., Skot OnSon participated in the [[Mission to Ord Cestus|Battle of Ord Cestus]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and was later killed. It was rumored that he was close friends with the leader of Desert Wind, [[Thak Val Zsing]].
